summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Anima Fund platform. Backend APIs 100% successful, frontend fully functional with minor React Flow edge rendering issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Multiple React Flow edge creation errors: 'Couldn't create edge for source handle id: undefined'

passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints working perfectly
Fund Overview page loads with correct metrics (AUM, agents, deals, portfolio)
Sidebar navigation works for all 7 pages
Backend API /api/fund/overview returns fund data with correct fields
Backend API /api/agents returns agent list (33 agents)
Backend API /api/deals returns deal data (25 deals)
Backend API /api/portfolio returns portfolio companies (5 companies)
Backend API /api/financials/history returns financial history (12 records)
Backend API /api/activity returns activity feed (12 activities)
Backend API /api/constitution returns constitution content (2665 chars)
Backend API /api/engine/status returns engine info with repo_present=true
Agent Network page renders with React Flow canvas
Deal Flow page shows deals table with search and filter
Portfolio page shows company cards with KPIs
Financials page shows charts and monthly breakdown table
Activity page shows activity list with category filters
Configuration page has 4 tabs: Engine Status, Constitution, Fund Config, Departments
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Flow edge creation errors in Agent Network page - edges are not connecting properly due to undefined source handle ids. The nodes display correctly but hierarchy connections are broken.
